name: Basil Pork Chops
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim and discard excess fat from the pork chops.
2. In a large frying pan, brown the chops without added fat.
3. When the chops are browned, add the remaining ingredients.
4. Cover tightly and simmer for 40 minutes or until tender.
5. Turn the meat occasionally to ensure even cooking.
6. If necessary, add a few tablespoons of water to prevent burning.
1 Serving: 1 Chop Plus 1 Tbsp. Sauce
Nutritive values per serving: 3 gm. carbohydrates; 25 gm. protein; 14 gm. fat; 240 calories; 0.7 gm. fiber; 521 mg. sodium; 91 mg. cholesterol
Food Exchange per serving: 3 Medium-Fat Exchanges + 1 Vegetable Exchange.
Low-sodium diets: Omit salt. Substitute unsalted V-8 Juice.
